base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of link_hurt_color_palette_examples — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Hurt-flash palette examples — 4 color variants (red/white/yellow/purple) that rapidly cycle on damage-take for invulnerability window. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hurt-flash palette examples — 4 color variants (red/white/yellow/purple) that rapidly cycle on damage-take for invulnerability window; shown at bottom of sheet with '>1' repeater indicating loop
